title: arctotis dregei
intro: Arctotis dregei, also known as the orange and yellow daisy or cape marigold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Arctotis dregei include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. Arctotis dregei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
